overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3: Blood and Wine showing Geralt of Rivia exploring the vibrant medieval town of Toussaint. The character walks through a sunlit village square, ascends to a scenic terrace overlooking a lake and mountains, pauses to admire the view, then returns through narrow flower-lined alleys.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square with market stalls and wooden well

events.description: turning slightly right toward stone staircase leading to terrace
passing close to knight in yellow armor who temporarily blocks left side of frame

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village square, passing wooden market stalls and various townspeople

notable_agents.action: knight in yellow and black striped armor standing guard near the path
woman in red skirt walking past Geralt in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden roofed well structure in the center of the village square
tall stone building with red roof tiles and wooden shutters
wide stone staircase leading up to the elevated terrace
checkered yellow and red banner hanging from stone building

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit medieval village square with a wooden well at its center. The stone tower house dominates the left side while various NPCs including a distinctive knight in yellow armor populate the scene. The camera approaches a stone staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace overlook with stone balustrade and panoramic views

events.description: ascending stone stairs from enclosed village square to open terrace
approaching group of conversing nobles gathered near the terrace railing

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbs the stone stairs and walks along the terrace edge overlooking the scenic valley and lake

notable_agents.action: group of nobles in fine clothing conversing near the stone balustrade

entered.detail: ornate stone railing with decorative pillars along terrace edge
expansive view of blue lake and snow-capped mountains in distance
patterned stone tile flooring of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends to an open terrace with panoramic views of a blue lake and distant mountains. The stone balustrade lines the right side while groups of nobles converse near the railing. The environment shifts from enclosed village to wide-open overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace overlook with hillside town view and flower gardens

events.description: brief fade to black transition then return to same location
Geralt stops to look at the view then turns around to walk back along terrace

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses at the overlook to admire the panoramic view, then turns and walks back along the terrace passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child running past Geralt on the terrace walkway

entered.detail: cluster of buildings with red roofs on the distant hillside
lavender-colored flowering bushes along terrace edge

segments.scene_description: After a brief fade transition, Geralt stands at the terrace edge admiring the view of the hillside town across the valley. He then turns and walks back along the terrace, passing a running child and other pedestrians, with the stone balustrade now on his left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley with flower gardens and stone archways

events.description: descending stone stairs from open terrace back to enclosed village level
passing through stone archway into narrower winding path

agents.ego_description: Geralt descends the stairs and walks through narrow village alleys lined with white and purple flowers, passing under stone archways

notable_agents.action: villager in purple shirt standing near wooden doorway adjusting hat

entered.detail: arched stone passageway covered in ivy between buildings
large tree with vibrant purple blossoms lining the path
winding stone path between high stone walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends from the terrace into narrow village alleys, passing through a stone archway. The path winds between stone walls covered in ivy and white flowers, with a large purple flowering tree visible ahead. The environment shifts from open panoramic views to enclosed intimate pathways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling medieval village square to a panoramic mountain overlook before descending into intimate, flower-lined alleys. It begins with Geralt walking through a sunlit square past a wooden well and a stone tower house, moving toward a staircase that leads upward. As he ascends, the enclosed village environment opens into a wide terrace where the camera reveals a sweeping view of a blue lake and distant mountains. After a moment of admiring the hillside town across the valley, the camera follows Geralt as he turns and walks back along the stone balustrade, passing pedestrians and a running child. The scene finally shifts from the open vista back to a confined space as he descends through a stone archway into narrow paths walled with ivy, white flowers, and a large purple flowering tree.
